keyPath.description: Dot-notation path to the group key. Items where the path resolves to undefined/null land in the `key: null` bucket.

outputKey.description: Output column name within each group row. MUST NOT be `key` or `count` (reserved).

op.description: Aggregation operation. `count` ignores `path` and counts group members; `array` collects every value at `path` into an array (preserves duplicates); others reduce.

path.description: Dot-notation path to the value being aggregated. Required for sum/avg/min/max/first/last/array; ignored for count.
